description: Two card-endpoints, both equal nodes, both adjacent within-set collector numbers, both anchored to a canonical Hoenn Rock/Steel three-stage evolution line (Aron → Lairon → Aggron, Generation III). The narrative bridge is in the printed flavor text: Aron's carapace-shedding line names the very transition Lairon's plating-and-boulder-ramming line then expresses. Habitat-shift mapping (grassland-meadow to rocky cave/tunnel) tracks Bulbapedia's documented species progression. Standard professional sigh. Mirror demanded.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Aron (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 304, evolves to Lairon at level 32]
[Bulbapedia: Lairon (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 305, mid-stage Rock/Steel]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-121 flavor_text — carapace shedding on evolution]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-122 flavor_text — sparks from ramming steel body into boulders]
other_candidates_considered: Aggron node speculation — rejected; Aggron is not in corpus. If Aggron lands in any set in a future Collectr upload, the third stage closes the line and a `hoenn-steel-line` or `aron-line` cohort node may be warranted under the elemental-monkey-trio / castform-forms-cycle precedent at N=3 corpus prints. Surface in janitor_triage as a future-node candidate with trigger condition 'when Aggron enters corpus'.
